creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Andrew Grillet <andrew@grillet.co.uk> -----

The description was wrong: however there was a problem more
serious than I reported: A perfectly good RTC was incorrectly
producing an error message reporting it as faulty to the
extent that FreeBSD failed to install.

I believe from circumstantial evidence (that may be entirely
wrong) that this was a side effect of a "64-bit integer" related
issue where 32 bits a written and 64 read.

I believe the correct thing would be to label it as unreproduceable.
